title: Embedded Software Engineer(Freelance | WFH)
description:
**About BeGig** 




 BeGig is the leading tech freelancing marketplace. We empower innovative, early\\-stage, non\\-tech founders to bring their visions to life by connecting them with top\\-tier freelance talent. By joining BeGig, you’re not just taking on one role—you’re signing up for a platform that will continuously match you with high\\-impact opportunities tailored to your expertise.
 



  





**Your Opportunity** 




 Join BeGig as an Embedded Engineer and design and develop systems for the next generation of connected devices. Work on hardware and software integrations for innovative products in industries like IoT, automotive, and consumer electronics.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 As an Embedded Engineer, you will:
 


* Design, develop, and test embedded systems and firmware.
* Program microcontrollers and integrate sensors, actuators, and other hardware components.
* Develop and optimize device firmware and ensure real\\-time performance.
* Collaborate with hardware teams to define specifications and troubleshoot system\\-level issues.
* Ensure firmware meets industry standards and product specifications.



  





**Technical Requirements \\& Skills** 



* Experience: 3\\+ years in embedded systems or firmware development.
* Tools: Proficient with C/C\\+\\+, RTOS, and hardware debugging tools.
* Platforms: Experience with microcontrollers (e.g., ARM, AVR) and development environments (e.g., Keil, IAR).
* Communication: Strong ability to document code, provide technical support, and work with cross\\-functional teams.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* A hands\\-on engineer who enjoys building real\\-world hardware\\-software systems.
* Analytical, with strong problem\\-solving and debugging skills.
* Self\\-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment.



  





**Why Join Us?** 



* Impact: Develop cutting\\-edge solutions for smart, connected products.
* Flexibility: Work remotely and take on projects that match your expertise.
* Innovation: Join a network of engineers solving real\\-world problems with hardware and software.

title: Software Engineer, Senior
description:
**Company Description**
**Strategy (Nasdaq: MSTR)** 
 is at the forefront of transforming organizations into intelligent enterprises through data\\-driven innovation. We don't just follow trends—we set them and drive change. As a market leader in enterprise analytics and AI software, we've pioneered the BI and analytics space, empowering people to make better decisions and revolutionizing how businesses operate. We are now also at the forefront of AI disruption, providing data via our enterprise semantic layer to AI agents, tools, and platforms.
   

  

 But that's not all. Strategy is also leading a groundbreaking shift in digital assets, adopting bitcoin as our primary treasury reserve asset in 2020\\. Since then, we have issued innovative bitcoin\\-backed securities and have been the leader in bitcoin treasury companies. This visionary move has helped us build a fortress balance sheet, and is solidifying our position as a forward\\-thinking, innovative force in the market.
   

  

 Our people are the core of our success. At Strategy, you'll join a team of smart, creative minds working on dynamic projects with cutting\\-edge technologies. We thrive on curiosity, innovation, and a relentless pursuit of excellence.
   

  

 Our corporate values—bold, agile, engaged, impactful, and united—are the foundation of our culture. As we lead the charge into the new era of AI and financial innovation, we foster an environment where every employee's contributions are recognized and valued.
   

  

 Join us and be part of an organization that lives and breathes innovation every day. At Strategy, you're not just another employee, you're a crucial part of a mission to push the boundaries of analytics and redefine financial investment.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Software Engineer, Senior**
**Location:** 
 Chennai (WFO – Monday to Friday)
   

  

**Experience:** 
 4 – 7 years
   

  

**Job Type:** 
 Full\\-time \\| Immediate joiners preferred
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to lead web application development projects. The ideal candidate should have expertise in Java, Python, React, HTML, CSS, TypeScript, and cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the design and development of scalable web applications.
* Architect backend solutions using Java and Python.
* Drive frontend development using React, HTML, CSS, and TypeScript.
* Integrate cloud\\-based services and optimize deployment pipelines using AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Mentor junior developers and conduct code reviews.
* Ensure performance, security, and scalability of applications.


**Skills Required**
* Proven experience in Java, Python, and JavaScript development.
* Strong expertise in frontend technologies such as React, HTML, CSS, and TypeScript.
* Working knowledge of cloud platforms – AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Excellent problem\\-solving and communication skills.


**Preferred Skills**
* Experience in microservices architecture and container orchestration.
* Proficiency with CI/CD tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or CircleCI.
* Exposure to observability tools like Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK stack.
* Experience with OAuth2 or other modern authentication methods.
* Understanding of scalability and fault\\-tolerance patterns in cloud environments.

**We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Staff Physical Design Engineer with a strong background in chip\\-level implementation and EDA tools. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in physical design, timing closure, and low\\-power design.**
